metadata.description: QASPER section-annotated chunks for MVT-RAG evaluation

examples.input: {"question": "How is their model different from BERT?", "paper_id": "1902.09314", "sections": "[INTRODUCTION] Introduction (6 chunks); [RELATED_WORK] Related Work (3 chunks); [METHODS] Proposed Methodology (2 chunks); [OTHER] Embedding Layer (2 chunks); [OTHER] Attentional Encoder Layer (14 chunks); [OTHER] Target-specific Attention Layer (2 chunks); [OTHER] Output Layer (2 chunks); [METHODS] Regularization and Model Training (6 chunks); [RESULTS] Datasets and Experimental Settings (2 chunks); [METHODS] Model Comparisons (17 chunks); [RESULTS] Main Results (3 chunks); [METHODS] Model Analysis (3 chunks); [DISCUSSION] Conclusion (1 chunks)", "num_sections": 13}
examples.output: {"gold_answer": "overall architecture of the proposed Attentional Encoder Network (AEN), which mainly consists of an embedding layer, an attentional encoder layer, a target-specific attention layer, and an output layer.", "evidence_chunk_ids": ["1902.09314_2_1"], "evidence_section_names": ["Proposed Methodology"]}

examples.input: {"question": "What meaningful information does the GRU model capture, which traditional ML models do not?", "paper_id": "1907.09369", "sections": "[INTRODUCTION] Introduction (3 chunks); [RELATED_WORK] Related Work (4 chunks); [METHODS] Baseline Approaches (3 chunks); [OTHER] Data and preparation (4 chunks); [METHODS] Model (4 chunks); [RESULTS] Experiment (2 chunks); [METHODS] Model Performances on New Dataset (8 chunks); [DISCUSSION] Conclusion and Future Work (1 chunks)", "num_sections": 8}
examples.output: {"gold_answer": " the context and sequential nature of the text", "evidence_chunk_ids": ["1907.09369_4_1"], "evidence_section_names": ["Model"]}

examples.input: {"question": "What are the different bilingual models employed?", "paper_id": "1910.05154", "sections": "[INTRODUCTION] Introduction (2 chunks); [METHODS] Methodology ::: The Multilingual Mboshi Parallel Corpus: (1 chunks); [METHODS] Methodology ::: Bilingual Unsupervised Word Segmentation/Discovery Approach: (1 chunks); [METHODS] Methodology ::: Multilingual Leveraging: (1 chunks); [RESULTS] Experiments (3 chunks); [DISCUSSION] Conclusion (1 chunks)", "num_sections": 6}
